title: Best Buy wants to be the hub for AI-powered hardware like glasses, laptops
description: The tech retailer is looking for growth, as its revenue was essentially flat this past fiscal year from the year before, at almost $42 billion.
summary_ko: 베스트바이가 AI 기반 하드웨어 허브로 성장하려 하고 있으나 전년 대비 매출이 거의 정체된 상황입니다. 회사는 AI 안경, 노트북 등 AI 기반 제품군을 통해 새로운 성장동력을 찾고 있습니다. 약 420억 달러 매출 규모에서 혁신적 변화가 필요한 시점입니다.
summary_en: Best Buy is positioning itself as a hub for AI-powered hardware amid flat revenue growth. The tech retailer is seeking new growth opportunities through AI devices like glasses and laptops. With revenue stagnant at around $42 billion, the company needs innovative strategies to drive growth.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 전통 리테일러도 AI 하드웨어에 주목하는 점을 참고해 AI 기반 제품 개발과 차별화된 고객 경험 제공에 투자해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands should note that even traditional retailers are pivoting to AI hardware, indicating the need to invest in AI-powered products and differentiated customer experiences.
key_points: Best Buy targeting AI hardware as growth driver
Revenue flat at $42 billion year-over-year
Focus on AI glasses and laptops as key categories

title: Future of TV Briefing: OpenX adds attention targeting for CTV ads backed by TVision
description: This week’s Future of TV Briefing looks at a new ad targeting option for CTV advertisers wary of people staring at their phones while an ad airs.
summary_ko: OpenX가 TVision과 협력해 CTV 광고에 어텐션 타겟팅 기능을 추가했습니다. 이는 광고 시청 중 스마트폰을 보는 시청자들을 우려하는 광고주들을 위한 새로운 타겟팅 옵션입니다. CTV 광고의 실제 시청 집중도를 측정하여 광고 효율성을 높이려는 시도입니다.
summary_en: OpenX has introduced attention targeting for CTV ads in partnership with TVision. This new targeting option addresses advertiser concerns about viewers looking at their phones during ad breaks. The solution aims to improve ad effectiveness by measuring actual viewer attention on CTV platforms.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 CTV 광고 집행 시 어텐션 메트릭을 활용해 실제 시청 집중도를 측정하고 광고 ROI를 개선할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands can leverage attention metrics in CTV advertising to measure real viewer engagement and improve advertising ROI.
key_points: OpenX launches attention targeting for CTV ads
Partnership with TVision for measurement
Addresses multi-screen attention challenges

title: AI surfacing is messy: Data shows publisher visibility and traffic often misalign
description: Reports tracking publishers in AI chatbots abound but conflicting rankings and uneven referral traffic reveal the murkiness of AI visibility.
summary_ko: AI 챗봇에서의 퍼블리셔 노출과 트래픽 간의 불일치가 심각한 문제로 대두되고 있습니다. AI 가시성을 추적하는 리포트들이 상충되는 순위를 보여주며 실제 트래픽 유입과 일치하지 않는 현상이 발생하고 있습니다. AI 검색 환경에서의 콘텐츠 노출 측정이 여전히 불명확한 상태입니다.
summary_en: Publisher visibility in AI chatbots often misaligns with actual traffic referrals, creating measurement challenges. Conflicting rankings in AI tracking reports reveal the complexity of measuring AI visibility effectively. The murkiness of AI surfacing makes it difficult for publishers to understand their true performance.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 AI 검색 최적화 전략 수립 시 단순 노출보다는 실제 트래픽과 전환율을 중심으로 성과를 측정해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands should focus on actual traffic and conversion metrics rather than just visibility when developing AI search optimization strategies.
key_points: AI chatbot visibility doesn't guarantee traffic
Conflicting AI tracking reports create confusion
Measurement challenges in AI search environments

title: The in-house entertainment studio is having its social media team moment
description: Brands are becoming media companies (again). This time they mean it.
summary_ko: 브랜드들이 인하우스 엔터테인먼트 스튜디오를 구축하며 미디어 회사로 변모하는 트렌드가 나타나고 있습니다. 이는 소셜미디어 팀의 순간과 유사한 패턴을 보이며, 브랜드들이 진정성 있게 미디어 제작에 나서고 있습니다. 콘텐츠 제작을 통한 브랜드 차별화 전략이 주목받고 있습니다.
summary_en: Brands are establishing in-house entertainment studios, transforming into media companies in a trend similar to the social media team boom. This movement represents a genuine commitment to content creation and media production. Brands are using entertainment content as a differentiation strategy in the market.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 인하우스 콘텐츠 제작 역량을 구축해 고객과의 직접적 소통 채널을 확보하고 브랜드 스토리텔링을 강화해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands should build in-house content production capabilities to establish direct customer communication channels and strengthen brand storytelling.
key_points: Brands becoming media companies through in-house studios
Similar pattern to social media team adoption
Entertainment content as brand differentiation

title: Today's NYT Mini Crossword Answers for Wednesday, March 11
description: Here are the answers for The New York Times Mini Crossword for March 11.
summary_ko: 뉴욕타임스 미니 크로스워드 퍼즐의 3월 11일 정답을 제공하는 기사입니다. 게임 관련 콘텐츠로 일반적인 엔터테인먼트 정보를 다루고 있습니다. D2C 비즈니스나 AI 상거래와 직접적인 연관성은 없는 콘텐츠입니다.
summary_en: This article provides answers for The New York Times Mini Crossword puzzle for March 11. It covers general entertainment content related to gaming and puzzles. The content has no direct relevance to D2C business or AI commerce applications.
so_what_ko: D2C 관점에서 직접적인 시사점이 없는 일반 엔터테인먼트 콘텐츠입니다.
so_what_en: No direct implications for D2C business as this is general entertainment content.
key_points: NYT Mini Crossword answers for March 11
Gaming and puzzle entertainment content
No business or commerce relevance

title: Time-Sensitive Offers in Google Ads
description:
A date-specific ad message does not automatically show, but workarounds can increase its chances.
The post Time-Sensitive Offers in Google Ads appeared first on Practical Ecommerce.
summary_ko: Google Ads에서 기간 한정 오퍼 메시지는 자동으로 표시되지 않지만 우회 방법을 통해 노출 가능성을 높일 수 있다. 날짜별 광고 메시지 운영을 위한 실용적 접근법을 제시한다. 시간 민감형 프로모션의 광고 효율성 개선 방안을 다룬다.
summary_en: Date-specific ad messages in Google Ads don't automatically display, but workarounds can increase their visibility chances. The article presents practical approaches for operating time-sensitive promotional campaigns. It covers methods to improve advertising efficiency for time-sensitive offers.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 플래시 세일이나 기간 한정 프로모션의 광고 노출을 최적화하여 전환율을 높일 수 있다.
so_what_en: D2C brands can optimize ad exposure for flash sales and limited-time promotions to increase conversion rates.
key_points: Time-sensitive ad messages require manual optimization in Google Ads
Workaround strategies can improve promotional campaign visibility
Date-specific offers need strategic planning for effective display

title: Fabletics expands into denim to ride casualization trend
description: CEO Adam Goldenberg told Retail Dive in January that shoppers expect athletic brands to offer casual products as apparel trends shift.
summary_ko: Fabletics가 캐주얼화 트렌드에 맞춰 데님 라인으로 사업을 확장한다. CEO Adam Goldenberg는 운동복 브랜드가 캐주얼 제품을 제공해야 한다고 언급했다. 의류 트렌드 변화에 따른 소비자 기대 충족을 위한 전략적 확장이다.
summary_en: Fabletics expands into denim to align with the casualization trend in apparel. CEO Adam Goldenberg stated that shoppers expect athletic brands to offer casual products. This strategic expansion responds to shifting consumer expectations in clothing trends.
so_what_ko: D2C 의류 브랜드는 소비자 라이프스타일 변화를 반영한 제품군 확장으로 시장 점유율을 늘릴 수 있다.
so_what_en: D2C apparel brands can increase market share by expanding product lines that reflect changing consumer lifestyles.
key_points: Athletic brands expanding into casual wear to meet consumer expectations
Casualization trend driving product line diversification
Strategic expansion responding to apparel market shifts

title: Kohl’s rules out major store closures despite disappointing Q4
description: The struggling department store is simplifying promotions and adding value-priced merchandise to appeal to its lower- to middle-income customer. But is it going far enough?
summary_ko: Kohl's가 실망스러운 4분기 실적에도 불구하고 대규모 매장 폐점을 배제한다고 발표했다. 중저소득층 고객을 위해 프로모션을 단순화하고 가성비 상품을 추가하는 전략을 추진한다. 하지만 이러한 변화가 충분한지에 대한 의문이 제기된다.
summary_en: Kohl's rules out major store closures despite disappointing Q4 performance. The company is simplifying promotions and adding value-priced merchandise to appeal to lower- to middle-income customers. Questions remain whether these changes go far enough to address challenges.
so_what_ko: 기존 리테일러의 가격 경쟁력 강화 전략은 D2C 브랜드에게 차별화된 가치 제안의 중요성을 시사한다.
so_what_en: Traditional retailers' price competitiveness strategies highlight the importance of differentiated value propositions for D2C brands.
key_points: Department store avoiding major closures despite poor performance
Strategy focuses on promotion simplification and value pricing
Targeting lower- to middle-income customer segments

title: The Brand House Collective COO exits after less than a year
description: James Schisler resigned from his role while the company is in the process of being acquired by Bed Bath & Beyond Inc.
summary_ko: The Brand House Collective의 COO James Schisler가 1년 미만 재직 후 사임했다. 회사는 현재 Bed Bath & Beyond Inc.에 인수되는 과정에 있다. 인수 진행 중 핵심 임원의 이탈이 발생한 상황이다.
summary_en: The Brand House Collective COO James Schisler resigned after less than a year in the role. The company is currently in the process of being acquired by Bed Bath & Beyond Inc. This executive departure occurs during the ongoing acquisition process.
so_what_ko: M&A 과정에서 핵심 인력 이탈은 불안정성을 나타내며, D2C 기업은 조직 안정성 확보가 중요하다.
so_what_en: Key personnel departures during M&A processes indicate instability, emphasizing the importance of organizational stability for D2C companies.
key_points: COO departure after less than one year tenure
Company undergoing acquisition by Bed Bath & Beyond
Executive turnover during acquisition process

title: Princess Polly plots next wave of US store openings
description: The apparel brand will open eight stores across Florida, Texas, Minnesota, Tennessee and North Carolina throughout this year and into 2027.
summary_ko: Princess Polly가 미국 내 다음 단계 매장 오픈을 계획하고 있다. 플로리다, 텍사스, 미네소타, 테네시, 노스캐롤라이나에 8개 매장을 올해부터 2027년까지 개점할 예정이다. 의류 브랜드의 적극적인 미국 시장 확장 전략이다.
summary_en: Princess Polly plans the next wave of US store openings across multiple states. The apparel brand will open eight stores in Florida, Texas, Minnesota, Tennessee, and North Carolina from this year through 2027. This represents an aggressive expansion strategy in the US market.
so_what_ko: 해외 D2C 브랜드의 오프라인 매장 확장은 옴니채널 전략의 중요성과 물리적 접점의 가치를 보여준다.
so_what_en: International D2C brands' offline store expansion demonstrates the importance of omnichannel strategy and physical touchpoint value.
key_points: Eight new store openings planned across five US states
Expansion timeline extends from 2026 through 2027
International apparel brand's US market penetration strategy

title: Petal & Pup eyes launch with Dillard’s, Von Maur
description: The fashion brand has a successful partnership with Nordstrom and is ready for additional growth.
summary_ko: 패션 브랜드 Petal & Pup이 Dillard's와 Von Maur와 새로운 파트너십을 체결했다고 발표했습니다. 이미 Nordstrom과 성공적인 파트너십을 보유하고 있는 이 브랜드는 추가적인 성장을 준비하고 있습니다. 이번 확장을 통해 더 많은 리테일 채널에서의 접점을 늘리려는 전략으로 보입니다.
summary_en: Fashion brand Petal & Pup announced new partnerships with department stores Dillard's and Von Maur. The brand already has a successful partnership with Nordstrom and is positioning for additional growth. This expansion represents a strategy to increase retail touchpoints across multiple channels.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드가 성장하면서 주요 백화점들과의 파트너십 확장이 중요한 성장 전략이 되고 있음을 보여줍니다.
so_what_en: Shows how D2C brands can scale by expanding partnerships with major department stores as a key growth strategy.
key_points: Petal & Pup expanding retail partnerships beyond Nordstrom
New partnerships with Dillard's and Von Maur announced
Brand positioning for additional growth through multi-channel strategy

title: Klaviyo and Shopify announce deeper product integration
description:
Customer relationship management (CRM) platform Klaviyo announced deepened product integration with ecommerce software provider Shopify. Klaviyo said the “expanded interoperability helps enterprises better unify customer data across regions.” In doing so, it said, the integration helps to deliver “consistent, localized experiences worldwide.” Klaviyo framed the integration around merchants expanding worldwide sales and a February 2025 […]
The post Klaviyo and Shopify announce deeper product integration appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
summary_ko: CRM 플랫폼 Klaviyo가 Shopify와 더 깊은 제품 통합을 발표했습니다. 이번 통합은 기업들이 지역 간 고객 데이터를 더 잘 통합하고 전 세계적으로 일관된 현지화 경험을 제공하는데 도움을 줍니다. 전 세계 판매 확장을 위한 상인들의 니즈에 맞춘 통합으로 평가됩니다.
summary_en: CRM platform Klaviyo announced deeper product integration with ecommerce software provider Shopify. The expanded interoperability helps enterprises better unify customer data across regions and deliver consistent, localized experiences worldwide. The integration is framed around merchants expanding global sales operations.
so_what_ko: 글로벌 D2C 확장 시 CRM과 이커머스 플랫폼 간의 데이터 통합이 일관된 고객 경험 제공의 핵심이 되고 있습니다.
so_what_en: Data integration between CRM and ecommerce platforms becomes crucial for delivering consistent customer experiences during global D2C expansion.
key_points: Klaviyo and Shopify announce deeper product integration
Focus on unifying customer data across regions
Enables consistent, localized experiences for global merchants

title: Kohl’s leans further into digital sales, Q4 revenue drops
description:
With ecommerce accounting for more than a third of total sales during Kohl’s Corp.’s fiscal Q4 2025, executives shared how the retailer is upgrading its digital infrastructure to improve profit margins, search and discoverability. CEO Michael Bender told analysts on the retailer’s quarterly earnings call that Kohl’s has “an opportunity to modernize” its capabilities and […]
The post Kohl’s leans further into digital sales, Q4 revenue drops appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
summary_ko: Kohl's가 4분기 매출이 감소했음에도 불구하고 디지털 판매에 더욱 집중하고 있습니다. 이커머스가 전체 매출의 3분의 1 이상을 차지하는 가운데, 수익 마진과 검색 기능 개선을 위해 디지털 인프라를 업그레이드하고 있습니다. CEO는 회사의 역량 현대화 기회가 있다고 언급했습니다.
summary_en: Kohl's is leaning further into digital sales despite Q4 revenue drops, with ecommerce accounting for over one-third of total sales. The retailer is upgrading its digital infrastructure to improve profit margins, search functionality, and discoverability. CEO mentioned opportunities to modernize the company's capabilities.
so_what_ko: 전통 리테일러들도 디지털 전환이 생존의 핵심이 되면서, 검색과 발견성 개선을 통한 수익성 확보에 집중하고 있습니다.
so_what_en: Traditional retailers are focusing on profitability through improved search and discoverability as digital transformation becomes essential for survival.
key_points: Ecommerce represents over one-third of Kohl's total sales
Company upgrading digital infrastructure for better margins
Focus on improving search and product discoverability

title: Agentic commerce faces reality check in B2B ecommerce
description:
The early excitement surrounding agentic commerce — the idea that artificial intelligence (AI) agents can search for products, compare options and complete purchases on behalf of buyers — is encountering a reality check as major technology companies refine their strategies. Recent moves from OpenAI and Amazon suggest the first generation of AI-driven purchasing may evolve […]
The post Agentic commerce faces reality check in B2B ecommerce appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
summary_ko: B2B 이커머스에서 에이전틱 커머스가 현실적인 점검에 직면하고 있습니다. AI 에이전트가 구매자를 대신해 제품을 검색하고 비교하며 구매를 완료한다는 초기의 흥미가 현실적 도전에 부딪히고 있습니다. OpenAI와 Amazon의 최근 움직임은 AI 기반 구매의 첫 번째 세대가 진화할 수 있음을 시사합니다.
summary_en: Agentic commerce is facing a reality check in B2B ecommerce as the initial excitement about AI agents conducting searches, comparisons, and purchases encounters practical challenges. Recent moves from major tech companies like OpenAI and Amazon suggest the first generation of AI-driven purchasing may need to evolve. The technology is being refined as companies adjust their strategies.
so_what_ko: AI 에이전트 기반 자동 구매는 아직 초기 단계이며, D2C 기업들은 성급한 도입보다는 단계적 접근이 필요합니다.
so_what_en: AI agent-based automated purchasing is still in early stages, requiring D2C companies to take gradual approaches rather than rushed adoption.
key_points: Agentic commerce facing reality check in practical implementation
Major tech companies refining their AI-driven purchasing strategies
First generation AI purchasing technology may need evolution

title: Kimberly-Clark appoints digital-focused executive
description:
Kimberly-Clark Corp. has appointed technology executive Francesco Tinto as chief information and global business services officer, expanding its leadership team as the consumer products manufacturer continues to invest in digital operations and shared services. Tinto assumed the role March 9 and reports to Russ Torres, president and chief operating officer. He will also serve on […]
The post Kimberly-Clark appoints digital-focused executive appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
summary_ko: 킴벌리 클라크가 기술 임원 Francesco Tinto를 최고 정보 및 글로벌 비즈니스 서비스 책임자로 임명했습니다. 이 소비재 제조업체는 디지털 운영과 공유 서비스에 지속적으로 투자하면서 리더십 팀을 확장하고 있습니다. Tinto는 3월 9일부터 역할을 시작했으며 사장 겸 최고 운영 책임자인 Russ Torres에게 보고합니다.
summary_en: Kimberly-Clark Corp. appointed technology executive Francesco Tinto as chief information and global business services officer, expanding its leadership team. The consumer products manufacturer continues investing in digital operations and shared services. Tinto assumed the role March 9 and reports to president and COO Russ Torres.
so_what_ko: 대형 소비재 기업들이 디지털 전환을 위해 전문 기술 리더십을 영입하는 추세가 가속화되고 있습니다.
so_what_en: Large consumer goods companies are accelerating the hiring of specialized technology leadership for digital transformation.
key_points: Kimberly-Clark appoints new chief information and global business services officer
Company expanding leadership team for digital operations investment
Focus on digital operations and shared services development
